meaning: n.[药]蟾蜍灵(用于治疗心脏病)
examples: Conclusion Bufalin is effective to inhibit the growth of mice S180 sarcoma.
Conclusion: ERK negatively regulated the apoptosis induced by bufalin in K562 cells.
Result Bufalin had inhibition growth effect on ECV304 cells with different level, and had concentration and time dependence.
